title: Compress the churn picture to one bullet
guidance: Reward the bullet that packs the most decision-relevant content into the fewest words and reads like a partner wrote it. Penalise padding, vagueness, or an AI 'feel'.

runner_input.instruction: Capture the essence of the material below in a single bullet for an IC slide.
runner_input.constraints: Output: exactly one markdown bullet (start with '- '). Max 30 words. No title, no second bullet.

items: Cartwright: last-mile logistics SaaS; ARR £15m; 320 customers
Gross churn 14% — high, concentrated in sub-£20k SMB accounts
Net retention 104% — enterprise upsell offsets SMB churn
AI ETA-prediction model live; +9pts on-time delivery
Growth concentrated in grocery vertical (61% of new logos)

rubric_notes: Should convey churn is an SMB problem masked by enterprise upsell.
